creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: 1.7.20 is a security release. Pending vuxml entry

@J.R Are you able to update your Bugzilla email to match the current MAINTAINER line in the port so we can verify and you can maintainer-approval + the patch?

For port removal (after this update), please create a separate issue for marking the port DEPRECATED (include move to newer port message) with EXPIRATION_DATE

At deletion time, the MOVED entry can be created
